evals.prompt: Plan a live webinar to sell my $997 course
evals.expected_output: A complete live webinar plan including presentation structure (teach-then-pitch or Perfect Webinar framework), registration page guidelines, reminder sequence, and post-webinar follow-up emails with replay strategy.

assertions.name: presentation_framework
assertions.description: Must recommend a presentation framework (teach-then-pitch, Perfect Webinar structure, or demo-based) with a content section before the pitch

assertions.name: registration_and_reminders
assertions.description: Must cover registration page optimization and a reminder sequence (at least confirmation, 24h before, 1h before, and at-start-time emails)

assertions.name: post_webinar_followup
assertions.description: Must outline a post-webinar follow-up sequence including replay access, objection handling, and a deadline-driven close

evals.prompt: My webinar gets 500 registrations but only 15% attend — how do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis that 15% attendance is below the 30-40% benchmark, with specific tactics to improve attendance: better reminder sequences, pre-webinar engagement, shorter registration-to-event lead time, and SMS reminders.

assertions.name: benchmark_comparison
assertions.description: Must identify that 15% attendance is below the healthy benchmark of 30-40% for live webinars

assertions.name: reminder_sequence_audit
assertions.description: Must recommend improving the reminder sequence, including sending a 'we're live now' email at start time

assertions.name: actionable_tactics
assertions.description: Must provide at least 3 specific tactics to improve attendance (e.g., shorter lead time, SMS reminders, pre-webinar engagement, calendar invites)

evals.prompt: Convert my live webinar into an evergreen automated funnel in Groove
evals.expected_output: A plan to convert a live webinar to evergreen using GrooveWebinar, including recording the presentation, setting up automated scheduling, building the funnel in GroovePages/GrooveFunnels, configuring GrooveMail for automated reminders and follow-up, and connecting GrooveSell for checkout.

assertions.name: groove_modules
assertions.description: Must reference specific Groove.cm modules (GrooveWebinar for the automated webinar, GrooveMail for follow-up, GrooveSell for checkout)

assertions.name: evergreen_mechanics
assertions.description: Must explain evergreen webinar mechanics: pre-recorded video, automated scheduling, and deadline-driven urgency tied to individual registration time

assertions.name: live_to_evergreen_process
assertions.description: Must advise validating the live webinar's conversion rate before automating and describe the recording and transition process
